name: zlib
description: MeshLib overlay: alias `zlib` to vcpkg's stock `zlib-ng` port built in compat mode. The real artefacts come from the dependency; this port itself installs nothing. ZLIB_COMPAT is forced ON via the MeshLib triplet files (thirdparty/vcpkg/triplets/*-meshlib*.cmake), so the resulting libz / zlib.h / ZLIB::ZLIB target are bit-compatible with stock zlib.
